[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up illustration shows a pale-skinned person with messy light-colored hair covering their nose and mouth with one hand in front of a tiled background, with the partially visible text “HEH” to the right.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person depicted in anime-style linework and shading, shown from the shoulders up, facing forward and looking slightly downward; their messy hair falls over their forehead and partially across their eyes. One hand covers the lower half of their face, with the fingers spread near the nose and mouth area. They wear a dark top and a dark collar, with a faint necklace or accessory visible around the neck.

Setting:
The background is an indoor-like tiled wall pattern with light-colored rectangular tiles and darker horizontal/vertical divisions. Lighting is even and flat, consistent with a stylized illustration.

Visual Details:
The person has light, neutral-toned skin, dark line outlines, and light hair in gray or white tones with individual strands. Their eyes appear half-lidded with dark shading around the eyelids and a focused, slightly downcast gaze. The hand covering their face shows detailed knuckles and finger placement, with nails not clearly defined. Clothing appears dark and layered, including a dark outer layer and a shirt underneath, with a subtle checkered texture visible on part of the clothing near the shoulder. The composition is tight, cropped close to the face, with the head centered and the right side showing part of a graphic text element.

Visible Text:
HEH

Practical Summary:
The image is an anime-style close-up of a person covering their nose and mouth with one hand. The background shows a tiled wall, and the text “HEH” appears partially on the right side.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

HEH

# Structured Version

- **HEH**

# Notes

- The final character(s) after “HEH” are cut off/unclear in the screenshot (only “HEH” is clearly readable).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
